title: Harnessmith change transaction proposal
description: The only unit of persistent change. Approval covers this whole transaction, never individual file operations.

plain_language.description: Must be understandable by a non-technical professional.

trigger.description: What prompted this: interview answer, correction, retrospective finding, refactor threshold.

path.description: Workspace-relative. Validators reject protected paths, traversal, and symlink escapes.

before_hash.description: SHA-256 of current content; null for create.

after_hash.description: SHA-256 of proposed content; null for delete.

assumptions.description: Unknowns the proposal proceeds on; shown to the user in the approval view.

predicted_eval_impact.description: Required for retrospective-originated proposals (shadow mode): which eval should improve.

rollback_id.description: Restore tag that reverses this transaction exactly.
